title: telemetry-logs — trait composition
description: Single owned trait — `StructuredLog` — for classes that want an ergonomic `$this->log()` helper that routes through this module's configured channel + enrichers.

owned.description: Adds `log(): LoggerInterface`, `logInfo(string $msg, array $context = [])`, `logWarning(...)`, `logError(...)`, `logException(\Throwable $e, array $context = [])`. Resolves the correct channel via #[AsLogChannel] class attribute or falls back to config('telemetry-logs.default_channel').

composition.note: This module owns no entities. Traits here are helpers for modules that opt into ergonomic logging.
